purpose: Lightweight baseline inventory for the 10-round governance workflow before expensive full-repository gates run.

aiflowTasks.title: Post-R6 framework gap roadmap
aiflowTasks.objective: Analyze current non-community gaps against Gin, Echo, Fiber, Hertz, go-zero, Kratos, Kitex, and gRPC-Go after R6 convergence; define the R7 smallest executable task roadmap.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Machine-readable R7 roadmap, boundary inventory, non-community scope, task order, acceptance gates, and claim boundaries.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after the boundary inventory gate passes

aiflowTasks.title: Runnable migration depth
aiflowTasks.objective: Deepen Gin, go-zero, Kratos, and Kitex migration proof with smoke commands, support-bundle handoff, compatibility caveats, rollback triggers, and failure report evidence.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Migration proof evidence linking each path to runnable smoke, support bundle, caveat, rollback action, and gate command.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after migration depth gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: RPC Tier 1 promotion evidence
aiflowTasks.objective: Turn RPC Tier 1 promotion blockers into explicit stream, resolver, balancer, retry, deadline, auth, tracing, benchmark, and rollback rows.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: RPC promotion evidence that separates supported behavior, candidate behavior, report-only latency, and rollback triggers.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC promotion gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Generated importer compatibility
aiflowTasks.objective: Extend generated importer compatibility across API imports, proto imports, alias collisions, generated-only dependencies, repeat generation diffs, and rollback.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Importer compatibility evidence for generated scaffold profiles and historical fixtures.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after importer compatibility gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: DB cache discovery proof
aiflowTasks.objective: Add DB, cache, and discovery proof rows for supported adapters, generated-project boundaries, dependency triggers, observability, fallback behavior, and rollback.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Integration proof evidence for SQL, Redis, cache, and discovery adapter adoption decisions.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after DB/cache/discovery proof gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Plugin template supply-chain
aiflowTasks.objective: Harden plugin and template supply-chain evidence across registry schema, manifest, digest, permission review, compatibility window, malicious paths, and no partial writes.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Plugin/template supply-chain evidence with conformance, permission, digest, compatibility, and isolation rows.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after plugin/template supply-chain gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Release CI supply-chain enforcement
aiflowTasks.objective: Tighten release CI supply-chain enforcement evidence with artifact producer, required-check, security scan, provenance, rollback, and publish/block decision rows.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Release CI supply-chain evidence linking artifacts, checks, scans, provenance, and adopter decisions.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after release CI supply-chain gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Performance trend promotion
aiflowTasks.objective: Add performance trend promotion evidence for multi-run confidence, promoted allocation budgets, report-only latency rows, unsupported surfaces, and adopter actions.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Performance promotion evidence that keeps latency conservative and allocation blocking explicit.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after performance trend gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Support bundle remediation loop
aiflowTasks.objective: Link doctor JSON, release check JSON, support bundle redaction, generated failure reports, dashboard fields, and next actions into a remediation loop.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Support-bundle remediation loop contract with CI/agent stable fields and next-action evidence.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after support remediation gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: R7 convergence evidence report
aiflowTasks.objective: Close the R7 governance batch by producing convergence evidence that all submitted R7 tasks have traceable artifacts, gates, commits, known risks, and follow-up ordering without committing runtime state.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Final R7 convergence report with per-task commits, gate evidence, runtime ignored paths, known risks, and next-round recommendations.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after convergence gate passes or environment-limited failures are documented

timeoutPolicy.fallback: Use governance-boundary-inventory-check for Round 01 evidence before running full go test ./...
